title: Wisecrack After Dark
description: Edgier, cheekier prompts for grown-up game nights. Off by default. Host toggles it on. Original content.

prompts.text: The worst thing to say out loud on a first date: ___

The worst possible thing to keep in your nightstand: ___
A terrible thing to name the group chat after the trip: ___
The real reason you got asked to leave the bar: ___

An unhinged thing to whisper to your massage therapist: ___
The worst possible thing to say to your in-laws over dinner: ___
A spectacularly bad theme for a bachelor or bachelorette party: ___
